entities.name: RPE (Rate of Perceived Exertion)
entities.context: Intensity measurement scale used to regulate workout effort; targets 6-7/10 in this phase

entities.context: Heart rate training zone used for Sunday hike sessions; low aerobic intensity

entities.context: Easy terrain hike, 60 minutes, Zone 2 intensity

entities.name: Perfect Form Principle
entities.context: Rule for Phase 2: slow, controlled movement speed prioritizing form over load

relationships.context: Phase 2 enforces slow, controlled movement with focus on perfect form
